displayName: Build a 16-step drum-and-bass beat machine using Tone.js: a
description: The artifact provides a generic reusable structure for a drum-and-bass beat machine using Tone.js. It features a neon-themed interface, a 16-step sequencer for musical components like kick, snare, hat, and bass, as well as user-interactive
qualityNotes: Promoted from candidate 734C0B12-679A-49C3-8DB0-6EE4F19C49DF (trigger=publishToCommunity, weight=2). Original session: 5795339C-CB11-41EE-A82F-D6ECA9C0A70E.

discriminator.reasoning: The artifact provides a generic reusable structure for a drum-and-bass beat machine using Tone.js. It features a neon-themed interface, a 16-step sequencer for musical components like kick, snare, hat, and bass, as well as user-interactive elements such as tempo control and random beat generation. The design and functions are general enough to be adapted for similar interactive audio applications.
